{{Quote|The initial assault claimed 32 clones, all from the 43rd 'Killer-Aiwha' Battalion, and there are three confirmed Jedi deaths: Dalnus Cam, Sana-Jis Ilowa, and Rallcema Bylissura.|HoloNet News Core Edition report|<ref name="HNN 14:9:01">{{InsiderCite|69|Republic HoloNet News Core Edition 14:9:01}}</ref>}}
'''Sana-Jis Ilowa''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] serving the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Like many Jedi of the era, Ilowa took up the rank of [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. She was killed during the [[Battle of Jabiim]] by the [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Separatist Droid Army]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]], Sana-Jis Ilowa was a member of [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the laste [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. After [[Jedi training/Legends|training]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], Ilowa eventually became a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]].<ref name="The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref>

When the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] erupted across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], Ilowa dutifully accepted her role as a [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] to counter the [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|droid army]] of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. During the war, Ilowa was assigned to assist in the massive [[Battle of Jabiim|defense]] of [[Jabiim/Legends|Jabiim]]. During the fighting, Ilowa was stationed at [[Shelter Base]] with fellow Jedi [[Dalnus Cam]] and [[Rallcema Bylissura]]. The Separatists laid waste to the base, ending Ilowa's life.<ref name="BOJ" />

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|Yes, those are the three Jedi we see in the comic, but we never determined which name went to which character.|Leland Chee|<ref name="StarWars.com Message Boards">{{SWBoards|url=thread.jspa?threadID=152583&start=1545#16926420|thread=Holocron continuity database questions|user=[[Leland Chee|Leland Y Chee]]|date=2007-09-26|time=5:34 PM|quote=Yes, those are the three Jedi we see in the comic, but we never determined which name went to which character.}}</ref>}}
[[File:Unnamed_Human_Female_Jedi.jpg|thumb|right|250px|A possible depiction of Sana-Jis Ilowa]]
It is possible Ilowa was the female [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] who, while using [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] in an attempt to free a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Walker/Legends|walker]] stuck in the mud, was stabbed in the back with a sword by [[Alto Stratus]], but that may have also been [[Rallcema Bylissura]]. Alternately, either Ilowa or Bylissura may have been the female Human Jedi who incorrectly reported all clear at Shelter Base just before the Separatist attack.<ref name="StarWars.com Message Boards" />
